name: Gmail
description: Send Gmail messages and create/send drafts through the Gmail API with OAuth2.

envFile.label: Gmail .env file
envFile.help: Local secrets file containing Gmail OAuth credentials. Do not commit it.

sender.label: Sender
sender.help: Default From address for outgoing Gmail messages.

enableDrafts.label: Enable drafts
enableDrafts.help: Allow draft creation and draft sending. Requires gmail.compose scope.

allowFromOverride.label: Allow From override
allowFromOverride.help: Allow tool calls to set a From address different from the configured sender.
